FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Rising Yields and Geopolitical Risk Premium Drive Bullish Momentum
tldr_points: Rising global yields providing tailwinds for USD/JPY
Crude oil recovery toward $95 increasing inflationary pressure
Fed commitment to 2% target sustaining USD strength
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY gains momentum as rising yields and crude oil recovery toward $95 bolster the USD against the Yen.
FX.comment: Bullish momentum driven by rising yields and oil-linked inflationary risks.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] DOWN: Yield Curve Steepening and Momentum Weakness Signal Further Decline
tldr_points: Energy sector rally insufficient to offset broader weakness
STOCKS.excerpt: Yield curve stress, waning momentum and mixed macro data suggest further downside for the S&P 500.
STOCKS.comment: Steepening yield curve and weakening momentum justify a short bias.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: $85K resistance level in focus with $1.69B ETF inflow streak providing structural tailwind
JPMorgan projects Strategy's bitcoin buying could reach $30B this year, creating sustained demand catalyst
Technical setup favors dip-buying toward MA20 support with institutional flows aligned
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC targets $85K resistance as $1.69B ETF inflows fuel bullish momentum
CRYPTO.comment: Bullish setup with ETF inflows and Strategy buying creating structural demand; dip toward MA20 offers optimal entry
